data.content: Implementation complete on branch codex/9a05-overview-lease-actions. Commits: 01c3f5be266b1dc1be0d38127e5f62d43ac38622 and f9364012. Latest pass fixed column header alignment, removed lease metadata labels/placeholders, styled Release/Focus session as action pills, and mapped non-empty top-level lease_agent metadata. Browser checked at /beats?view=overview&state=queued. Gates passed: bun run lint; bunx tsc --noEmit; bun run test; bun run build. Also reported upstream Knots lease metadata JSON issue as knots-e935.
